ChangeRequest.short_description: Change VLAN on a Cisco switchport
ChangeRequest.description: Change the port of a Cisco switch to a new VLAN. This would commonly occur when moving a server from one IP network to another.

Decommission a server from use including removal from backup, systems management and monitoring systems and disposal of hardware

ChangeRequest.short_description: Clear BGP sessions on a Cisco router
ChangeRequest.description:
Resend the complete BGP table to neighboring routers

--Both neighbors need to support soft reset route refresh capability.
--Stores complete BGP table of you neighbor in router memory.
--Not a good idea on a peering router with full feed, due to the memory requirements.

ChangeRequest.short_description: Switch Sales over to the new 555 prefix
ChangeRequest.description: Sales has their own private dialing prefix now so they'll always have an open outside line even if the PBX is full.
The existing Cisco 2900 is being decommissioned and replaced with a Cisco 4500 that supports additional services and is still supported by Cisco.

ChangeRequest.short_description: Upgrade OWA-SD-01 to MS Windows Server 2016

ChangeRequest.description: The database size has increased and the cache hit rate is at the low end of an acceptable rate. The Database team needss to increase the amount of memory allocated to the Oracle SGA to increase the cache hit rate.
NY RAC instance needs to be upgraded from Oracle 11g to Oracle 12c

ChangeRequest.short_description: A failed RAID controller card needs to be replaced on PSORA1
ChangeRequest.description: 01:00.0 RAID bus controller: Adaptec AAC-RAID has failed on PSORA1 and needs to be replaced immediately.

ChangeRequest.description: The default support group for all Oracle CI's is being transitioned to the Database group

ChangeRequest.short_description: CMS App FLX (depends on Java Apps FLX)
R&D wants to know what it'd cost to switch them over to Linux desktops
ChangeRequest.description:
The new VP of R&D is thinking of switching the
engineers over to Linux desktops and wants to know what it'd take on
our end to support them, what it would cost to install them, and how
fast the whole thing could happen.

ChangeRequest.short_description: Put another 100 Gb drive on the 2nd Floor Server
ChangeRequest.description:
We're going to put another 100 GB drive on the floor 2 server.
Needs a 100 GB SCSI II Ultra Drive.

Performance of the Siebel SFA software has been severely degraded since the upgrade performed this weekend.

We moved to an unsupported Oracle DB version. Need to rollback the Oracle Instance to a supported version.
